pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if source/target remains at 11 while running on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.
